title: ACIS Rebalance Manifest v1
description: Canonical, deterministically-serialized record of a single rebalance event across the ACIS production streams (equity ai_master_portfolios, sector_rotation_master, options_master). Each manifest is SHA-256 hashed, anchored to Bitcoin via OpenTimestamps, and committed to a public git repo.

manifest_id.description: Deterministic UUID v5 seeded on (stream, strategy_id, original_event_date, retroactive).

strategy_id.description: Stream-scoped strategy key. Equity: strategy_type from ai_master_portfolios (e.g. 'value_largecap'). Sector rotation: fixed 'sector_rotation_voltgt15' or successor. Options: 'config_{config_id}' (e.g. 'config_20').

strategy_name.description: Human-readable display name at time of manifest.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone offset for when the manifest JSON was serialized.

anchor_date.description: Date the OpenTimestamps stamp was requested. Everything after this date is cryptographically provable to have existed before it.

original_event_date.description: Date the underlying rebalance/pick actually occurred. For live rebalances, equals anchor_date. For historical backfill, precedes anchor_date.

retroactive.description: True when original_event_date precedes anchor_date. Cryptographic proof does NOT extend before anchor_date for retroactive entries; retroactive=true entries are ACIS's own record, not third-party-verifiable pick timing.

feature_store_hash.description: SHA-256 (hex, 64 chars) of the deterministically-serialized feature snapshot fed into this run. Null when feature-store snapshot tracking is not yet wired for the emitting stream; will be populated in a later phase.

training_data_cutoff.description: Last training-data observation date (strict-PIT). Null for retroactive entries where cutoff was not recorded.

state_label.description: Argmax regime label at the moment of the run (e.g. 'vol_expansion', 'normal', 'risk_off').

probability_vector.description: Map of regime target/state -> model output. For the current regime model these are per-target predictions (e.g. predicted_vol_expansion_60d, risk_on_score) — not strictly probabilities but the raw scoring inputs into the state_label choice. Keys sorted at serialize time for determinism.

positions.description: Full holding list AFTER the rebalance is applied. Order MUST match the order of appearance in the source table (positions jsonb), preserved as-is. Do not re-sort in the manifest — order is signal.

weight.description: Portfolio weight (0-1). Sum across positions SHOULD equal 1.0 within 1e-6 for long-only equity streams; may deviate for options.

shares.description: Share count for the recorded book. Null if manifest represents a target-weight decision without a fixed dollar book.

entry_price.description: Execution price recorded in the source table.

model_score.description: Raw model score / predicted return / rank input for this pick.

rank_in_universe.description: 1-indexed rank within the scored universe (1 = top pick).

rationale.description: AI-generated commentary snapshotted from the source table at manifest time. All fields may be null when source row had not yet been evaluated.

backtest_snapshot.description: Walk-forward metadata locking in the OOS numbers used to justify this strategy at manifest time. Retroactive manifests reproduce the values at the RUN date, not today.

backtest_commit_hash.description: Git commit of platform code used to generate the backtest snapshot. Enables reviewer reproduction.

prev_manifest_hash.description: content_hash of the immediately preceding manifest for the same (stream, strategy_id) tuple. Null for the first entry per stream+strategy. Forms an append-only Merkle chain that makes silent rewrites impossible.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 (hex, 64 chars) of the manifest with `content_hash` field ABSENT, serialized deterministically (sort_keys=True, separators=(',', ':'), ensure_ascii=False, UTF-8). This is the value stamped via OpenTimestamps.
